title: AlphaToca Backend - Plano de Tarefas
summary: Task plan (Jira-ready checklist) covering webhooks, BullMQ workers, WhatsApp outbound, chat state, RAG/LangChain, lead qualification, and documentation phases for AlphaToca backend.
notes: Task/roadmap checklist rather than a decision, requirement spec, or API contract. No frontmatter, no ADR Decision/Consequences, no user stories, no API schemas. Classified as DOC (supporting project context). Implicit requirements exist but are phrased as action items, making PRD a weaker secondary signal.
